coverage.note: Retrofit-only scope; no production Java code added or modified. The 1 new test class is a structural invariant (grep-based) and not a subject of line/branch coverage. Coverage gate applies to producer code (KnowledgeAssembler, story-0051-0001) and downstream cleanup (story-0051-0006).

delta.note: Net delta of +1: RuleKpRetrofitInvariantTest adds one new invariant method (noOldKpReferences_inRules).

acceptanceCriteriaCheckResults.evidence: Pre-retrofit grep identified 7 core rule files + 2 conditional rule files referencing the legacy skills/{kp}/SKILL.md path pattern. Inventory recorded in the story File Footprint section.

9 rule files retrofitted (01-project-identity.md, 03-coding-standards.md, 04-architecture-summary.md, 05-quality-gates.md, 06-security-baseline.md, 07-operations-baseline.md, 08-release-process.md, 09-branching-model.md, conditional/09-data-management.md). Post-retrofit grep on skills/{kp}/SKILL.md returns 0 lines in targets/claude/rules/. grep on knowledge/{kp}.md returns >= 7 lines.
rules/02-domain.md contains only {PLACEHOLDER} tokens, no KP references. Regex whitelist (32 literal KP names) does not match placeholder syntax. File byte-identical to pre-retrofit state.

acceptanceCriteriaCheckResults.scenario: preservação de referências a skills reais (error path invertido)
acceptanceCriteriaCheckResults.evidence: rules/13-skill-invocation-protocol.md references public skill names (e.g., x-pr-fix, x-pr-watch-ci), not KPs. Regex whitelist targets only KP names (architecture, security, testing, etc.), so skill-name references are out of scope. File byte-identical to pre-retrofit state. Rules 20 and 21 similarly unaffected.

checks: All 9 retrofitted rule files use the knowledge/ prefix uniformly
Rules 02, 13, 20, 21 byte-identical to pre-retrofit state (no KP references to rewrite)
No residual skills/{kp}/SKILL.md or skills/{kp}/references/ references anywhere under targets/claude/rules/
Regex scope (32-element KP_NAMES whitelist) prevents overreach into legitimate public skill-name references

smokeResult.note: mvn test: BUILD SUCCESS at 4163 tests / 0 failures / 0 errors / 0 skipped. RuleKpRetrofitInvariantTest green. KnowledgeMigrationInvariantTest and SkillConsumerRetrofitInvariantTest unchanged and green.
